name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: Provides marketing-oriented skills enabling Claude Code and AI agents to perform conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering tasks.

inputs.name: marketing_goal
inputs.description: The target marketing objective such as increasing conversions, improving SEO ranking, or generating copy.

inputs.name: content_data
inputs.description: Input text or web content for copywriting, SEO analysis, or conversion optimization.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Data related to user behavior, website traffic, or campaign performance for growth engineering or CRO.

inputs.name: keywords
inputs.description: Relevant keywords for SEO tasks and content targeting.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Marketing copy or web content refined for SEO, engagement, and conversions.

outputs.name: seo_report
outputs.description: Analysis results highlighting SEO strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities.

outputs.name: conversion_insights
outputs.description: Actionable recommendations based on CRO analysis.

outputs.name: growth_strategy
outputs.description: Proposed tactics and engineering approaches to accelerate user acquisition and retention.

patterns: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) analysis and recommendation
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) auditing and keyword targeting
Prompt-based marketing task decomposition for AI agents
steps: Receive marketing goals and relevant input data (content, keywords, analytics).
Analyze input content for SEO and conversion performance metrics.
Generate or optimize marketing copy tailored to target audience and marketing goals.
Perform analytics to extract insights for growth and CRO.
Synthesize recommendations for SEO improvements, conversion rate enhancements, and growth strategies.
Return structured outputs including optimized content, reports, and actionable strategies.
use_cases: Enhancing website landing pages to improve conversion rates.
Generating SEO-friendly marketing copy for product launches.
Conducting SEO audits to identify content gaps and keyword opportunities.
Using web traffic and user analytics data to inform growth hacking tactics.
Supporting AI agents in automating multi-channel marketing campaigns.

prompt_templates.name: seo_analysis_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following content for SEO effectiveness and suggest improvements: {content_data}

prompt_templates.name: cro_recommendation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Given these analytics insights: {analytics_data}, suggest strategies to improve conversion rates.

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create engaging marketing copy focused on {marketing_goal} using these keywords: {keywords}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Develop a growth engineering plan based on user behavior analytics: {analytics_data}.
